# solution.py

"""
CollaborativeDesignSuite - A multi-agent collaborative design tool that enables
a team of designers to work together on a shared digital canvas.
"""

import hashlib
import uuid
import time
import threading
from enum import Enum
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple, Any
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from datetime import datetime


# ============================================================================
# 1. User Registration and Authentication
# ============================================================================

class AuthenticationError(Exception):
    """Raised when authentication fails."""
    pass


class RegistrationError(Exception):
    """Raised when registration fails."""
    pass


@dataclass
class User:
    """Represents a registered user/designer."""
    user_id: str
    username: str
    email: str
    password_hash: str
    created_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    is_active: bool = True


class AuthenticationSystem:
    """Handles user registration, authentication, and session management."""

    def __init__(self):
        self._users: Dict[str, User] = {}
        self._sessions: Dict[str, str] = {}  # token -> user_id
        self._lock = threading.Lock()

    def _hash_password(self, password: str) -> str:
        """Hash a password using SHA-256."""
        return hashlib.sha256(password.encode()).hexdigest()

    def register(self, username: str, email: str, password: str) -> User:
        """Register a new user."""
        with self._lock:
            for user in self._users.values():
                if user.username == username:
                    raise RegistrationError(f"Username '{username}' already exists.")
                if user.email == email:
                    raise RegistrationError(f"Email '{email}' already registered.")

            if len(password) < 6:
                raise RegistrationError("Password must be at least 6 characters.")

            user_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
            user = User(
                user_id=user_id,
                username=username,
                email=email,
                password_hash=self._hash_password(password),
            )
            self._users[user_id] = user
            return user

    def login(self, username: str, password: str) -> str:
        """Authenticate a user and return a session token."""
        with self._lock:
            for user in self._users.values():
                if user.username == username:
                    if user.password_hash == self._hash_password(password):
                        token = str(uuid.uuid4())
                        self._sessions[token] = user.user_id
                        return token
                    raise AuthenticationError("Invalid password.")
            raise AuthenticationError(f"User '{username}' not found.")

    def logout(self, token: str) -> bool:
        """Invalidate a session token."""
        with self._lock:
            if token in self._sessions:
                del self._sessions[token]
                return True
            return False

    def validate_session(self, token: str) -> Optional[User]:
        """Validate a session token and return the associated user."""
        with self._lock:
            user_id = self._sessions.get(token)
            if user_id:
                return self._users.get(user_id)
            return None

    def get_user(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[User]:
        """Get a user by their ID."""
        return self._users.get(user_id)

    @property
    def is_initialized(self) -> bool:
        """Check if the authentication system is ready."""
        return True


# ============================================================================
# 2. Real-Time Collaboration Canvas
# ============================================================================

class CanvasEvent(Enum):
    """Types of canvas events for real-time updates."""
    ELEMENT_ADDED = "element_added"
    ELEMENT_MODIFIED = "element_modified"
    ELEMENT_REMOVED = "element_removed"
    ELEMENT_MOVED = "element_moved"
    CURSOR_MOVED = "cursor_moved"
    USER_JOINED = "user_joined"
    USER_LEFT = "user_left"


@dataclass
class CanvasUpdate:
    """Represents a real-time update on the canvas."""
    event_type: CanvasEvent
    user_id: str
    element_id: Optional[str]
    data: Dict[str, Any]
    timestamp: float = field(default_factory=time.time)


class CollaborationCanvas:
    """Shared digital canvas supporting real-time multi-user collaboration."""

    def __init__(self, auth_system: AuthenticationSystem):
        if not auth_system.is_initialized:
            raise RuntimeError(
                "Authentication system must be initialized before canvas."
            )
        self._auth_system = auth_system
        self._elements: Dict[str, 'DesignElement'] = {}
        self._active_users: Dict[str, str] = {}  # user_id -> token
        self._update_history: List[CanvasUpdate] = []
        self._subscribers: List[Any] = []
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._is_active = True

    @property
    def is_active(self) -> bool:
        """Check if the collaboration canvas is active."""
        return self._is_active

    def join(self, token: str) -> bool:
        """A user joins the canvas session."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session. Please log in first.")
        with self._lock:
            self._active_users[user.user_id] = token
            self._broadcast(CanvasUpdate(
                event_type=CanvasEvent.USER_JOINED,
                user_id=user.user_id,
                element_id=None,
                data={"username": user.username},
            ))
        return True

    def leave(self, token: str) -> bool:
        """A user leaves the canvas session."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if user and user.user_id in self._active_users:
            with self._lock:
                del self._active_users[user.user_id]
                self._broadcast(CanvasUpdate(
                    event_type=CanvasEvent.USER_LEFT,
                    user_id=user.user_id,
                    element_id=None,
                    data={"username": user.username},
                ))
            return True
        return False

    def add_element(self, token: str, element: 'DesignElement') -> str:
        """Add a design element to the canvas."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")
        with self._lock:
            self._elements[element.element_id] = element
            self._broadcast(CanvasUpdate(
                event_type=CanvasEvent.ELEMENT_ADDED,
                user_id=user.user_id,
                element_id=element.element_id,
                data=element.to_dict(),
            ))
        return element.element_id

    def remove_element(self, token: str, element_id: str) -> bool:
        """Remove a design element from the canvas."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")
        with self._lock:
            if element_id in self._elements:
                del self._elements[element_id]
                self._broadcast(CanvasUpdate(
                    event_type=CanvasEvent.ELEMENT_REMOVED,
                    user_id=user.user_id,
                    element_id=element_id,
                    data={},
                ))
                return True
        return False

    def get_element(self, element_id: str) -> Optional['DesignElement']:
        """Get a design element by ID."""
        return self._elements.get(element_id)

    def get_all_elements(self) -> List['DesignElement']:
        """Get all design elements on the canvas."""
        return list(self._elements.values())

    def get_active_users(self) -> List[str]:
        """Get list of active user IDs."""
        return list(self._active_users.keys())

    def subscribe(self, callback) -> None:
        """Subscribe to canvas updates."""
        self._subscribers.append(callback)

    def _broadcast(self, update: CanvasUpdate) -> None:
        """Broadcast an update to all subscribers."""
        self._update_history.append(update)
        for subscriber in self._subscribers:
            try:
                subscriber(update)
            except Exception:
                pass

    def get_update_history(self) -> List[CanvasUpdate]:
        """Get the full update history."""
        return list(self._update_history)


# ============================================================================
# 3. Shape and Texture Tools
# ============================================================================

class ShapeType(Enum):
    """Available shape types."""
    RECTANGLE = "rectangle"
    CIRCLE = "circle"
    TRIANGLE = "triangle"
    ELLIPSE = "ellipse"
    POLYGON = "polygon"
    LINE = "line"
    FREEFORM = "freeform"


@dataclass
class Point:
    """2D point representation."""
    x: float
    y: float


@dataclass
class Color:
    """RGBA color representation."""
    r: int = 0
    g: int = 0
    b: int = 0
    a: int = 255

    def to_hex(self) -> str:
        return f"#{self.r:02x}{self.g:02x}{self.b:02x}"


@dataclass
class Texture:
    """Represents a texture that can be applied to shapes."""
    texture_id: str
    name: str
    pattern: str  # e.g., "solid", "gradient", "hatched", "dotted", "custom"
    primary_color: Color = field(default_factory=Color)
    secondary_color: Optional[Color] = None
    opacity: float = 1.0
    scale: float = 1.0
    rotation: float = 0.0

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "texture_id": self.texture_id,
            "name": self.name,
            "pattern": self.pattern,
            "primary_color": self.primary_color.to_hex(),
            "opacity": self.opacity,
            "scale": self.scale,
            "rotation": self.rotation,
        }


@dataclass
class DesignElement:
    """Base class for all design elements on the canvas."""
    element_id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: str = "Untitled"
    position: Point = field(default_factory=lambda: Point(0, 0))
    width: float = 100.0
    height: float = 100.0
    rotation: float = 0.0
    z_index: int = 0
    visible: bool = True
    locked: bool = False
    created_by: str = ""
    created_at: float = field(default_factory=time.time)
    group_id: Optional[str] = None

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "element_id": self.element_id,
            "name": self.name,
            "position": {"x": self.position.x, "y": self.position.y},
            "width": self.width,
            "height": self.height,
            "rotation": self.rotation,
            "z_index": self.z_index,
            "visible": self.visible,
            "locked": self.locked,
        }


@dataclass
class Shape(DesignElement):
    """A geometric shape element."""
    shape_type: ShapeType = ShapeType.RECTANGLE
    fill_color: Color = field(default_factory=Color)
    stroke_color: Color = field(default_factory=lambda: Color(0, 0, 0))
    stroke_width: float = 1.0
    texture: Optional[Texture] = None
    points: List[Point] = field(default_factory=list)

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        base = super().to_dict()
        base.update({
            "type": "shape",
            "shape_type": self.shape_type.value,
            "fill_color": self.fill_color.to_hex(),
            "stroke_color": self.stroke_color.to_hex(),
            "stroke_width": self.stroke_width,
            "has_texture": self.texture is not None,
        })
        return base


class DependencyError(Exception):
    """Raised when a dependency requirement is not met."""
    pass


class ShapeTools:
    """Tools for creating and editing geometric shapes."""

    def __init__(self):
        self._is_initialized = True

    @property
    def is_initialized(self) -> bool:
        return self._is_initialized

    def create_shape(
        self,
        shape_type: ShapeType,
        position: Point,
        width: float = 100.0,
        height: float = 100.0,
        fill_color: Optional[Color] = None,
        stroke_color: Optional[Color] = None,
        stroke_width: float = 1.0,
        name: str = "",
        created_by: str = "",
    ) -> Shape:
        """Create a new shape."""
        shape = Shape(
            name=name or f"{shape_type.value}_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}",
            position=position,
            width=width,
            height=height,
            shape_type=shape_type,
            fill_color=fill_color or Color(200, 200, 200),
            stroke_color=stroke_color or Color(0, 0, 0),
            stroke_width=stroke_width,
            created_by=created_by,
        )
        return shape

    def create_polygon(
        self, points: List[Point], name: str = "", created_by: str = ""
    ) -> Shape:
        """Create a polygon from a list of points."""
        if len(points) < 3:
            raise ValueError("A polygon requires at least 3 points.")
        min_x = min(p.x for p in points)
        min_y = min(p.y for p in points)
        max_x = max(p.x for p in points)
        max_y = max(p.y for p in points)
        shape = Shape(
            name=name or f"polygon_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}",
            position=Point(min_x, min_y),
            width=max_x - min_x,
            height=max_y - min_y,
            shape_type=ShapeType.POLYGON,
            points=points,
            created_by=created_by,
        )
        return shape

    def resize_shape(self, shape: Shape, width: float, height: float) -> Shape:
        """Resize a shape."""
        if shape.locked:
            raise ValueError("Cannot resize a locked shape.")
        shape.width = width
        shape.height = height
        return shape

    def move_shape(self, shape: Shape, new_position: Point) -> Shape:
        """Move a shape to a new position."""
        if shape.locked:
            raise ValueError("Cannot move a locked shape.")
        shape.position = new_position
        return shape

    def rotate_shape(self, shape: Shape, angle: float) -> Shape:
        """Rotate a shape by the given angle in degrees."""
        if shape.locked:
            raise ValueError("Cannot rotate a locked shape.")
        shape.rotation = (shape.rotation + angle) % 360
        return shape

    def duplicate_shape(self, shape: Shape, offset: Point = None) -> Shape:
        """Create a duplicate of the shape with a slight offset."""
        if offset is None:
            offset = Point(10, 10)
        new_shape = Shape(
            name=f"{shape.name}_copy",
            position=Point(
                shape.position.x + offset.x, shape.position.y + offset.y
            ),
            width=shape.width,
            height=shape.height,
            shape_type=shape.shape_type,
            fill_color=shape.fill_color,
            stroke_color=shape.stroke_color,
            stroke_width=shape.stroke_width,
            texture=shape.texture,
            points=[Point(p.x, p.y) for p in shape.points],
            created_by=shape.created_by,
        )
        return new_shape


class TextureTools:
    """Tools for creating and applying textures to shapes."""

    def __init__(self, shape_tools: ShapeTools):
        if not shape_tools.is_initialized:
            raise DependencyError(
                "Shape tools must be initialized before texture tools."
            )
        self._shape_tools = shape_tools
        self._textures: Dict[str, Texture] = {}
        self._preload_default_textures()

    def _preload_default_textures(self) -> None:
        """Preload a set of default textures."""
        defaults = [
            ("solid", "Solid Fill", "solid"),
            ("gradient_linear", "Linear Gradient", "gradient"),
            ("gradient_radial", "Radial Gradient", "gradient"),
            ("hatched", "Hatched Pattern", "hatched"),
            ("dotted", "Dotted Pattern", "dotted"),
            ("crosshatch", "Crosshatch Pattern", "hatched"),
        ]
        for tid, name, pattern in defaults:
            self._textures[tid] = Texture(
                texture_id=tid, name=name, pattern=pattern
            )

    def create_texture(
        self,
        name: str,
        pattern: str,
        primary_color: Color = None,
        secondary_color: Color = None,
        opacity: float = 1.0,
        scale: float = 1.0,
    ) -> Texture:
        """Create a custom texture."""
        texture_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        texture = Texture(
            texture_id=texture_id,
            name=name,
            pattern=pattern,
            primary_color=primary_color or Color(128, 128, 128),
            secondary_color=secondary_color,
            opacity=opacity,
            scale=scale,
        )
        self._textures[texture_id] = texture
        return texture

    def apply_texture(self, shape: Shape, texture_id: str) -> Shape:
        """Apply a texture to a shape. Shape must exist first (dependency)."""
        if shape is None:
            raise DependencyError(
                "Cannot apply texture: shape must be created first."
            )
        texture = self._textures.get(texture_id)
        if not texture:
            raise ValueError(f"Texture '{texture_id}' not found.")
        shape.texture = texture
        return shape

    def remove_texture(self, shape: Shape) -> Shape:
        """Remove texture from a shape."""
        shape.texture = None
        return shape

    def get_available_textures(self) -> List[Texture]:
        """Get all available textures."""
        return list(self._textures.values())

    def get_texture(self, texture_id: str) -> Optional[Texture]:
        """Get a texture by ID."""
        return self._textures.get(texture_id)


# ============================================================================
# 4. Element Management and Organization
# ============================================================================

class AlignmentType(Enum):
    """Alignment options for design elements."""
    LEFT = "left"
    RIGHT = "right"
    TOP = "top"
    BOTTOM = "bottom"
    CENTER_HORIZONTAL = "center_horizontal"
    CENTER_VERTICAL = "center_vertical"


class ArrangementType(Enum):
    """Arrangement options for element z-ordering."""
    BRING_TO_FRONT = "bring_to_front"
    SEND_TO_BACK = "send_to_back"
    BRING_FORWARD = "bring_forward"
    SEND_BACKWARD = "send_backward"


@dataclass
class ElementGroup:
    """A group of design elements."""
    group_id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: str = "Untitled Group"
    element_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    locked: bool = False
    created_by: str = ""


class ElementManager:
    """Manages organization, alignment, grouping, and arrangement of elements."""

    def __init__(self, shape_tools: ShapeTools, texture_tools: TextureTools):
        if not shape_tools.is_initialized:
            raise DependencyError(
                "Shape and texture tools must be operational before "
                "element management."
            )
        self._shape_tools = shape_tools
        self._texture_tools = texture_tools
        self._groups: Dict[str, ElementGroup] = {}

    def align_elements(
        self, elements: List[DesignElement], alignment: AlignmentType
    ) -> List[DesignElement]:
        """Align a list of elements based on the specified alignment type."""
        if not elements:
            return elements

        if alignment == AlignmentType.LEFT:
            min_x = min(e.position.x for e in elements)
            for e in elements:
                if not e.locked:
                    e.position.x = min_x
        elif alignment == AlignmentType.RIGHT:
            max_right = max(e.position.x + e.width for e in elements)
            for e in elements:
                if not e.locked:
                    e.position.x = max_right - e.width
        elif alignment == AlignmentType.TOP:
            min_y = min(e.position.y for e in elements)
            for e in elements:
                if not e.locked:
                    e.position.y = min_y
        elif alignment == AlignmentType.BOTTOM:
            max_bottom = max(e.position.y + e.height for e in elements)
            for e in elements:
                if not e.locked:
                    e.position.y = max_bottom - e.height
        elif alignment == AlignmentType.CENTER_HORIZONTAL:
            centers = [e.position.x + e.width / 2 for e in elements]
            avg_center = sum(centers) / len(centers)
            for e in elements:
                if not e.locked:
                    e.position.x = avg_center - e.width / 2
        elif alignment == AlignmentType.CENTER_VERTICAL:
            centers = [e.position.y + e.height / 2 for e in elements]
            avg_center = sum(centers) / len(centers)
            for e in elements:
                if not e.locked:
                    e.position.y = avg_center - e.height / 2

        return elements

    def distribute_elements_horizontal(
        self, elements: List[DesignElement]
    ) -> List[DesignElement]:
        """Distribute elements evenly along the horizontal axis."""
        if len(elements) < 3:
            return elements
        sorted_elements = sorted(elements, key=lambda e: e.position.x)
        total_width = sum(e.width for e in sorted_elements)
        leftmost = sorted_elements[0].position.x
        rightmost = sorted_elements[-1].position.x + sorted_elements[-1].width
        available_space = rightmost - leftmost - total_width
        gap = available_space / (len(sorted_elements) - 1)

        current_x = leftmost
        for e in sorted_elements:
            if not e.locked:
                e.position.x = current_x
            current_x += e.width + gap

        return elements

    def group_elements(
        self, elements: List[DesignElement], name: str = "", created_by: str = ""
    ) -> ElementGroup:
        """Group a set of elements together."""
        group = ElementGroup(
            name=name or f"Group_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}",
            element_ids=[e.element_id for e in elements],
            created_by=created_by,
        )
        for element in elements:
            element.group_id = group.group_id
        self._groups[group.group_id] = group
        return group

    def ungroup(self, group_id: str, elements: List[DesignElement]) -> bool:
        """Ungroup elements."""
        if group_id not in self._groups:
            return False
        for element in elements:
            if element.group_id == group_id:
                element.group_id = None
        del self._groups[group_id]
        return True

    def arrange_element(
        self,
        element: DesignElement,
        arrangement: ArrangementType,
        all_elements: List[DesignElement],
    ) -> List[DesignElement]:
        """Arrange an element's z-index relative to other elements."""
        z_indices = sorted(set(e.z_index for e in all_elements))

        if arrangement == ArrangementType.BRING_TO_FRONT:
            max_z = max(e.z_index for e in all_elements) if all_elements else 0
            element.z_index = max_z + 1
        elif arrangement == ArrangementType.SEND_TO_BACK:
            min_z = min(e.z_index for e in all_elements) if all_elements else 0
            element.z_index = min_z - 1
        elif arrangement == ArrangementType.BRING_FORWARD:
            element.z_index += 1
        elif arrangement == ArrangementType.SEND_BACKWARD:
            element.z_index -= 1

        return all_elements

    def lock_element(self, element: DesignElement) -> DesignElement:
        """Lock an element to prevent modifications."""
        element.locked = True
        return element

    def unlock_element(self, element: DesignElement) -> DesignElement:
        """Unlock an element."""
        element.locked = False
        return element

    def get_group(self, group_id: str) -> Optional[ElementGroup]:
        """Get a group by ID."""
        return self._groups.get(group_id)

    def get_all_groups(self) -> List[ElementGroup]:
        """Get all element groups."""
        return list(self._groups.values())


# ============================================================================
# 5. Annotation and Commenting System
# ============================================================================

@dataclass
class Annotation:
    """Represents an annotation or comment on the canvas."""
    annotation_id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    author_id: str = ""
    author_name: str = ""
    content: str = ""
    position: Point = field(default_factory=lambda: Point(0, 0))
    target_element_id: Optional[str] = None
    parent_annotation_id: Optional[str] = None  # For threaded replies
    created_at: float = field(default_factory=time.time)
    updated_at: float = field(default_factory=time.time)
    resolved: bool = False
    reactions: Dict[str, List[str]] = field(default_factory=dict)

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "annotation_id": self.annotation_id,
            "author_id": self.author_id,
            "author_name": self.author_name,
            "content": self.content,
            "position": {"x": self.position.x, "y": self.position.y},
            "target_element_id": self.target_element_id,
            "resolved": self.resolved,
            "created_at": self.created_at,
        }


class AnnotationSystem:
    """System for adding annotations and comments on the canvas."""

    def __init__(self, canvas: CollaborationCanvas, auth_system: AuthenticationSystem):
        if not canvas.is_active:
            raise DependencyError(
                "Collaboration canvas must be active before annotations."
            )
        self._canvas = canvas
        self._auth_system = auth_system
        self._annotations: Dict[str, Annotation] = {}
        self._lock = threading.Lock()

    def add_annotation(
        self,
        token: str,
        content: str,
        position: Point,
        target_element_id: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> Annotation:
        """Add an annotation to the canvas."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")

        if target_element_id:
            element = self._canvas.get_element(target_element_id)
            if not element:
                raise ValueError(
                    f"Target element '{target_element_id}' not found on canvas."
                )

        with self._lock:
            annotation = Annotation(
                author_id=user.user_id,
                author_name=user.username,
                content=content,
                position=position,
                target_element_id=target_element_id,
            )
            self._annotations[annotation.annotation_id] = annotation
        return annotation

    def reply_to_annotation(
        self, token: str, parent_annotation_id: str, content: str
    ) -> Annotation:
        """Reply to an existing annotation (threaded comment)."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")

        parent = self._annotations.get(parent_annotation_id)
        if not parent:
            raise ValueError(
                f"Parent annotation '{parent_annotation_id}' not found."
            )

        with self._lock:
            reply = Annotation(
                author_id=user.user_id,
                author_name=user.username,
                content=content,
                position=parent.position,
                target_element_id=parent.target_element_id,
                parent_annotation_id=parent_annotation_id,
            )
            self._annotations[reply.annotation_id] = reply
        return reply

    def edit_annotation(
        self, token: str, annotation_id: str, new_content: str
    ) -> Annotation:
        """Edit an existing annotation."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")

        annotation = self._annotations.get(annotation_id)
        if not annotation:
            raise ValueError(f"Annotation '{annotation_id}' not found.")
        if annotation.author_id != user.user_id:
            raise PermissionError("Can only edit your own annotations.")

        with self._lock:
            annotation.content = new_content
            annotation.updated_at = time.time()
        return annotation

    def resolve_annotation(self, token: str, annotation_id: str) -> Annotation:
        """Mark an annotation as resolved."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")

        annotation = self._annotations.get(annotation_id)
        if not annotation:
            raise ValueError(f"Annotation '{annotation_id}' not found.")

        with self._lock:
            annotation.resolved = True
            annotation.updated_at = time.time()
        return annotation

    def delete_annotation(self, token: str, annotation_id: str) -> bool:
        """Delete an annotation."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")

        with self._lock:
            annotation = self._annotations.get(annotation_id)
            if not annotation:
                return False
            if annotation.author_id != user.user_id:
                raise PermissionError("Can only delete your own annotations.")
            del self._annotations[annotation_id]
        return True

    def add_reaction(
        self, token: str, annotation_id: str, reaction: str
    ) -> Annotation:
        """Add a reaction to an annotation."""
        user = self._auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")

        annotation = self._annotations.get(annotation_id)
        if not annotation:
            raise ValueError(f"Annotation '{annotation_id}' not found.")

        with self._lock:
            if reaction not in annotation.reactions:
                annotation.reactions[reaction] = []
            if user.user_id not in annotation.reactions[reaction]:
                annotation.reactions[reaction].append(user.user_id)
        return annotation

    def get_annotations_for_element(
        self, element_id: str
    ) -> List[Annotation]:
        """Get all annotations targeting a specific element."""
        return [
            a for a in self._annotations.values()
            if a.target_element_id == element_id and not a.parent_annotation_id
        ]

    def get_replies(self, annotation_id: str) -> List[Annotation]:
        """Get all replies to an annotation."""
        return [
            a for a in self._annotations.values()
            if a.parent_annotation_id == annotation_id
        ]

    def get_all_annotations(self) -> List[Annotation]:
        """Get all annotations."""
        return list(self._annotations.values())

    def get_unresolved_annotations(self) -> List[Annotation]:
        """Get all unresolved annotations."""
        return [a for a in self._annotations.values() if not a.resolved]


# ============================================================================
# 6. Dependency Management
# ============================================================================

class TaskStatus(Enum):
    """Status of a managed task."""
    PENDING = "pending"
    IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    BLOCKED = "blocked"
    FAILED = "failed"


@dataclass
class ManagedTask:
    """A task within the dependency management system."""
    task_id: str
    name: str
    description: str
    status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING
    dependencies: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    created_at: float = field(default_factory=time.time)
    completed_at: Optional[float] = None

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "task_id": self.task_id,
            "name": self.name,
            "status": self.status.value,
            "dependencies": self.dependencies,
        }


class DependencyManager:
    """Manages task dependencies within the application.

    Ensures that certain features/tasks are only available after their
    prerequisites are completed.
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self._tasks: Dict[str, ManagedTask] = {}
        self._lock = threading.Lock()

    def register_task(
        self, task_id: str, name: str, description: str,
        dependencies: List[str] = None
    ) -> ManagedTask:
        """Register a new task with optional dependencies."""
        with self._lock:
            task = ManagedTask(
                task_id=task_id,
                name=name,
                description=description,
                dependencies=dependencies or [],
            )
            self._tasks[task_id] = task
            self._update_blocked_status()
        return task

    def complete_task(self, task_id: str) -> ManagedTask:
        """Mark a task as completed and unblock dependents."""
        with self._lock:
            task = self._tasks.get(task_id)
            if not task:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found.")
            if task.status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED:
                raise DependencyError(
                    f"Task '{task_id}' is blocked by unmet dependencies: "
                    f"{self._get_unmet_dependencies(task_id)}"
                )
            task.status = TaskStatus.COMPLETED
            task.completed_at = time.time()
            self._update_blocked_status()
        return task

    def start_task(self, task_id: str) -> ManagedTask:
        """Start a task if all dependencies are met."""
        with self._lock:
            task = self._tasks.get(task_id)
            if not task:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found.")
            unmet = self._get_unmet_dependencies(task_id)
            if unmet:
                raise DependencyError(
                    f"Cannot start '{task_id}'. Unmet dependencies: {unmet}"
                )
            task.status = TaskStatus.IN_PROGRESS
        return task

    def can_proceed(self, task_id: str) -> bool:
        """Check if a task can proceed (all dependencies met)."""
        task = self._tasks.get(task_id)
        if not task:
            return False
        return len(self._get_unmet_dependencies(task_id)) == 0

    def get_task_status(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskStatus]:
        """Get the status of a task."""
        task = self._tasks.get(task_id)
        return task.status if task else None

    def get_all_tasks(self) -> List[ManagedTask]:
        """Get all registered tasks."""
        return list(self._tasks.values())

    def get_ready_tasks(self) -> List[ManagedTask]:
        """Get tasks that are ready to start (all dependencies met)."""
        return [
            t for t in self._tasks.values()
            if t.status == TaskStatus.PENDING and self.can_proceed(t.task_id)
        ]

    def get_blocked_tasks(self) -> List[ManagedTask]:
        """Get tasks that are currently blocked."""
        return [
            t for t in self._tasks.values()
            if t.status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED
        ]

    def get_dependency_graph(self) -> Dict[str, List[str]]:
        """Get the full dependency graph."""
        return {
            t.task_id: t.dependencies for t in self._tasks.values()
        }

    def _get_unmet_dependencies(self, task_id: str) -> List[str]:
        """Get list of unmet dependency task IDs."""
        task = self._tasks.get(task_id)
        if not task:
            return []
        unmet = []
        for dep_id in task.dependencies:
            dep_task = self._tasks.get(dep_id)
            if not dep_task or dep_task.status != TaskStatus.COMPLETED:
                unmet.append(dep_id)
        return unmet

    def _update_blocked_status(self) -> None:
        """Update blocked/pending status based on current dependency state."""
        for task in self._tasks.values():
            if task.status in (TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.IN_PROGRESS):
                continue
            unmet = self._get_unmet_dependencies(task.task_id)
            if unmet:
                task.status = TaskStatus.BLOCKED
            elif task.status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED:
                task.status = TaskStatus.PENDING


# ============================================================================
# Main Application - CollaborativeDesignSuite
# ============================================================================

class CollaborativeDesignSuite:
    """
    Main application class that integrates all components of the collaborative
    design suite with proper dependency management.
    """

    def __init__(self):
        # Initialize dependency manager
        self.dependency_manager = DependencyManager()
        self._register_application_tasks()

        # 1. Initialize Authentication (no dependencies)
        self.auth_system = AuthenticationSystem()
        self.dependency_manager.start_task("auth_system")
        self.dependency_manager.complete_task("auth_system")

        # 2. Initialize Collaboration Canvas (depends on auth)
        self.canvas = CollaborationCanvas(self.auth_system)
        self.dependency_manager.start_task("collaboration_canvas")
        self.dependency_manager.complete_task("collaboration_canvas")

        # 3. Initialize Shape and Texture Tools (independent)
        self.shape_tools = ShapeTools()
        self.texture_tools = TextureTools(self.shape_tools)
        self.dependency_manager.start_task("shape_texture_tools")
        self.dependency_manager.complete_task("shape_texture_tools")

        # 4. Initialize Element Manager (depends on shape/texture tools)
        self.element_manager = ElementManager(
            self.shape_tools, self.texture_tools
        )
        self.dependency_manager.start_task("element_management")
        self.dependency_manager.complete_task("element_management")

        # 5. Initialize Annotation System (depends on canvas)
        self.annotation_system = AnnotationSystem(self.canvas, self.auth_system)
        self.dependency_manager.start_task("annotation_system")
        self.dependency_manager.complete_task("annotation_system")

    def _register_application_tasks(self) -> None:
        """Register all application tasks with their dependencies."""
        self.dependency_manager.register_task(
            "auth_system",
            "User Registration and Authentication",
            "User registration and authentication system.",
            dependencies=[],
        )
        self.dependency_manager.register_task(
            "collaboration_canvas",
            "Real-Time Collaboration Canvas",
            "Shared digital canvas for multi-user collaboration.",
            dependencies=["auth_system"],
        )
        self.dependency_manager.register_task(
            "shape_texture_tools",
            "Shape and Texture Tools",
            "Tools for creating shapes and applying textures.",
            dependencies=[],
        )
        self.dependency_manager.register_task(
            "element_management",
            "Element Management and Organization",
            "Features for aligning, grouping, and arranging elements.",
            dependencies=["shape_texture_tools"],
        )
        self.dependency_manager.register_task(
            "annotation_system",
            "Annotation and Commenting System",
            "System for annotating and commenting on design elements.",
            dependencies=["collaboration_canvas"],
        )

    # --- High-level API methods ---

    def register_user(self, username: str, email: str, password: str) -> User:
        """Register a new designer."""
        return self.auth_system.register(username, email, password)

    def login_user(self, username: str, password: str) -> str:
        """Log in a designer and return session token."""
        return self.auth_system.login(username, password)

    def logout_user(self, token: str) -> bool:
        """Log out a designer."""
        return self.auth_system.logout(token)

    def join_canvas(self, token: str) -> bool:
        """Join the collaboration canvas."""
        return self.canvas.join(token)

    def leave_canvas(self, token: str) -> bool:
        """Leave the collaboration canvas."""
        return self.canvas.leave(token)

    def create_shape(
        self,
        token: str,
        shape_type: ShapeType,
        position: Point,
        width: float = 100.0,
        height: float = 100.0,
        fill_color: Optional[Color] = None,
        name: str = "",
    ) -> Shape:
        """Create a shape and add it to the canvas."""
        user = self.auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")
        shape = self.shape_tools.create_shape(
            shape_type=shape_type,
            position=position,
            width=width,
            height=height,
            fill_color=fill_color,
            name=name,
            created_by=user.user_id,
        )
        self.canvas.add_element(token, shape)
        return shape

    def apply_texture_to_shape(
        self, token: str, element_id: str, texture_id: str
    ) -> Shape:
        """Apply a texture to an existing shape on the canvas."""
        user = self.auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")
        element = self.canvas.get_element(element_id)
        if not element:
            raise DependencyError(
                "Shape must be created before applying texture."
            )
        if not isinstance(element, Shape):
            raise ValueError("Textures can only be applied to shapes.")
        return self.texture_tools.apply_texture(element, texture_id)

    def add_annotation(
        self,
        token: str,
        content: str,
        position: Point,
        target_element_id: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> Annotation:
        """Add an annotation to the canvas."""
        if not self.canvas.is_active:
            raise DependencyError(
                "Annotations require the collaboration canvas to be active."
            )
        return self.annotation_system.add_annotation(
            token, content, position, target_element_id
        )

    def align_elements(
        self, element_ids: List[str], alignment: AlignmentType
    ) -> List[DesignElement]:
        """Align selected elements."""
        elements = [
            self.canvas.get_element(eid)
            for eid in element_ids
            if self.canvas.get_element(eid) is not None
        ]
        return self.element_manager.align_elements(elements, alignment)

    def group_elements(
        self, token: str, element_ids: List[str], name: str = ""
    ) -> ElementGroup:
        """Group selected elements."""
        user = self.auth_system.validate_session(token)
        if not user:
            raise AuthenticationError("Invalid session.")
        elements = [
            self.canvas.get_element(eid)
            for eid in element_ids
            if self.canvas.get_element(eid) is not None
        ]
        return self.element_manager.group_elements(
            elements, name, created_by=user.user_id
        )

    def get_application_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get the overall application status including dependency state."""
        tasks = self.dependency_manager.get_all_tasks()
        return {
            "application": "CollaborativeDesignSuite",
            "tasks": [t.to_dict() for t in tasks],
            "active_canvas_users": len(self.canvas.get_active_users()),
            "total_elements": len(self.canvas.get_all_elements()),
            "total_annotations": len(
                self.annotation_system.get_all_annotations()
            ),
        }


# ============================================================================
# Demonstration / Entry Point
# ============================================================================

def main():
    """Demonstrate the CollaborativeDesignSuite functionality."""
    print("=" * 60)
    print("  CollaborativeDesignSuite - Multi-Agent Design Tool")
    print("=" * 60)

    # Initialize the application
    suite = CollaborativeDesignSuite()
    print("\n[OK] Application initialized successfully.")

    # 1. User Registration and Authentication
    print("\n--- User Registration ---")
    user1 = suite.register_user("alice", "alice@design.co", "password123")
    user2 = suite.register_user("bob", "bob@design.co", "securepass")
    print(f"  Registered: {user1.username} ({user1.email})")
    print(f"  Registered: {user2.username} ({user2.email})")

    token1 = suite.login_user("alice", "password123")
    token2 = suite.login_user("bob", "securepass")
    print(f"  Alice logged in (token: {token1[:8]}...)")
    print(f"  Bob logged in (token: {token2[:8]}...)")

    # 2. Join the Collaboration Canvas
    print("\n--- Collaboration Canvas ---")
    suite.join_canvas(token1)
    suite.join_canvas(token2)
    print(f"  Active users on canvas: {len(suite.canvas.get_active_users())}")

    # 3. Create Shapes
    print("\n--- Shape Creation ---")
    rect = suite.create_shape(
        token1, ShapeType.RECTANGLE, Point(50, 50), 200, 150,
        fill_color=Color(66, 133, 244), name="Header Background"
    )
    circle = suite.create_shape(
        token2, ShapeType.CIRCLE, Point(300, 200), 100, 100,
        fill_color=Color(234, 67, 53), name="Logo Circle"
    )
    triangle = suite.create_shape(
        token1, ShapeType.TRIANGLE, Point(150, 300), 120, 120,
        fill_color=Color(52, 168, 83), name="Accent Triangle"
    )
    print(f"  Created: {rect.name} ({rect.shape_type.value})")
    print(f"  Created: {circle.name} ({circle.shape_type.value})")
    print(f"  Created: {triangle.name} ({triangle.shape_type.value})")

    # 4. Apply Textures (depends on shapes existing)
    print("\n--- Texture Application ---")
    textures = suite.texture_tools.get_available_textures()
    print(f"  Available textures: {len(textures)}")
    suite.apply_texture_to_shape(token1, rect.element_id, "gradient_linear")
    print(f"  Applied 'Linear Gradient' to '{rect.name}'")

    custom_tex = suite.texture_tools.create_texture(
        "Wood Grain", "custom", Color(139, 90, 43), opacity=0.8
    )
    suite.apply_texture_to_shape(token2, circle.element_id, custom_tex.texture_id)
    print(f"  Applied '{custom_tex.name}' to '{circle.name}'")

    # 5. Element Management
    print("\n--- Element Organization ---")
    all_elements = suite.canvas.get_all_elements()
    suite.element_manager.align_elements(all_elements, AlignmentType.LEFT)
    print("  Aligned all elements to left")

    group = suite.group_elements(
        token1, [rect.element_id, circle.element_id], "Logo Group"
    )
    print(f"  Grouped elements into '{group.name}' ({len(group.element_ids)} items)")

    suite.element_manager.arrange_element(
        triangle, ArrangementType.BRING_TO_FRONT, all_elements
    )
    print(f"  Brought '{triangle.name}' to front")

    # 6. Annotations and Comments
    print("\n--- Annotations ---")
    note1 = suite.add_annotation(
        token2, "Love the color choice here!", Point(50, 50), rect.element_id
    )
    print(f"  Bob annotated: \"{note1.content}\"")

    reply = suite.annotation_system.reply_to_annotation(
        token1, note1.annotation_id, "Thanks! Should we make it darker?"
    )
    print(f"  Alice replied: \"{reply.content}\"")

    note2 = suite.add_annotation(
        token1, "TODO: Add shadow effect to this shape", Point(300, 200),
        circle.element_id
    )
    print(f"  Alice annotated: \"{note2.content}\"")

    # 7. Dependency Management Status
    print("\n--- Dependency Management Status ---")
    status = suite.get_application_status()
    for task in status["tasks"]:
        print(f"  [{task['status'].upper():>11}] {task['name']}")
        if task["dependencies"]:
            print(f"               Depends on: {task['dependencies']}")

    print(f"\n  Canvas Users: {status['active_canvas_users']}")
    print(f"  Total Elements: {status['total_elements']}")
    print(f"  Total Annotations: {status['total_annotations']}")

    # Demonstrate dependency enforcement
    print("\n--- Dependency Enforcement Demo ---")
    try:
        # Attempting to apply texture without shape fails
        suite.apply_texture_to_shape(token1, "nonexistent_id", "solid")
    except DependencyError as e:
        print(f"  [BLOCKED] {e}")

    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("  CollaborativeDesignSuite demo complete!")
    print("=" * 60)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
